---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling Data
- Data Visualization
- [Tidy Data Joins](assignments/tidy-data-joins.html)
- [Introduction to Spatial Data](assignments/intro-to-spatial-data.html)
